parameters.material_variant_method: Duplicate Component Material nodes with different KMB settings
parameters.geometry_variant_method: Duplicate Component Geometry + use Component Geometry Variants node
parameters.set_variant_node: Permanently selects a variant (created via right-click on asset)

constraints: Material variants: duplicate Component Material nodes inside the Component Builder, each with a different Karma Material Builder.
Geometry variants: duplicate Component Geometry nodes, modify each, then use 'Component Geometry Variants' node to merge them.
The Component Builder automatically creates variant sets when multiple Component Material or Component Geometry nodes exist.
Explore Variants node is for PREVIEWING — it lets you switch between variants interactively without committing.
Set Variant node COMMITS a variant choice — created by selecting asset, right-click, choose variant.
Geometry and material variant sets are independent — you can have nested variant sets (geo x material).
Each geometry variant can have its own material variants.
test_criteria: Inside a Component Builder: (1) Create two Component Material nodes with different KMBs (e.g., 'red' and 'blue'). (2) Verify Component Builder auto-creates a material variant set. (3) Use Explore Variants to preview switching between variants. (4) Create Set Variant node and verify it commits a choice. (5) For geometry variants: duplicate Component Geometry, use Component Geometry Variants node, verify nested variant sets work.

workflow: Duplicate Component Material nodes inside Component Builder
Each duplicate gets a different Karma Material Builder with different settings
Component Builder automatically creates a material variant set
Commit with Set Variant (right-click asset -> choose variant)
Duplicate Component Geometry nodes inside Component Builder
Modify each geometry variant (e.g., different proportions, shapes)
Use Component Geometry Variants node to merge geometry variants
Each geometry variant can independently have its own material variants
Explore with Explore Variants node — switch between geo and material sets independently

nested_variants.description: Geometry and material variant sets are orthogonal. A single asset can have N geometry variants x M material variants, all independently selectable.
